name: pollinator_buffer_peanut_yield_pesticide_downwind_apiary
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Agricultural Policy, the situation tagged internally around pollinator buffer peanut yield pesticide downwind apiary has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as individual against collective; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Casey Frost
agents.identity: I am Casey Frost, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Agricultural Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hana Singh
agents.identity: I am Hana Singh, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Agricultural Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect collective.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Casey Frost must choose under individual versus collective. What does Casey Frost do?
